---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the spec, template, or linter
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What decision-recording gap does this leave unsolved?

## Proposed solution

What you'd add or change. Note whether this touches SPEC.md normative text (frontmatter keys, section names, claim names) since those changes need a Maintainer decision; see CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why you didn't propose them instead.
